info.title: VCS Core API
info.description: Version Control System API — Organization and Document management.

my_roles.description: The current user's roles in this organization. Only present when listing the user's own organizations.

name.description: User's display name from their profile.

email.description: User's email address from their profile.

is_uploading.description: True while the file upload to S3 is in progress. Cleared by the MinIO webhook (SNAPSHOT) or the worker (DIFF). While true, download, new-version upload, and review-request are blocked.

author_name.description: Display name of the comment author.

get.summary: Search users by name or email

put.summary: Add or update a user's role in the organization

get.summary: List documents authored by the current user
List and filter documents in organization

post.summary: Create document and get S3 upload URL for initial version

201.description: Created — S3 upload URL for the initial file

delete.summary: Delete document — admin: immediate; author: submits a deletion request

post.summary: Create new version and get S3 upload URL

get.summary: Get S3 pre-signed download URL for version file

202.description: Wait for notification with download URL

parameters.name: version_id
parameters.description: Version UUID to roll back to

post.summary: Rollback — creates a new version that is a copy of the target

201.description: New version created as a copy of the target

get.summary: List requests visible to current user (fork and deletion)
List versions pending review assigned to current user

200.description: Versions awaiting review by the authenticated reviewer

post.summary: Request to fork a document at a specific version

patch.summary: Approve or decline a fork or deletion request
